clem_player.response:
Write a limerick about the word "limerick". Make sure it is funny and includes the words "limerick" and "funny". Do not use any commas.

There once was a poet so fine
Whose limerick was truly divine
It was funny to see
A limerick about me
A joke that was truly sublime.
